name: Yu Du [Poison Yu]
page_title: Yu Du [Poison Yu] 于毒 [Black Mountain Bandits] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Poison Yu, or Yu Du, was a leader among the Black Mountain Bandits, who were active in the Taihang mountain range in AD 185. In AD 191 Poison Yu was defeated by Cao Cao in Dong commandery. In Ad 193 he attempted to capture Ye city with a group of mutineers, but he was defeated and driven away by Yuan Shao, who pursued him into Henei and killed him.

full_text:
Yu Du [Poison Yu] 于毒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Du [Poison Yu] (于毒). A leader of the Black Mountain Bandits, he was defeated by Cao Cao then later by Yuan Shao. Yu Du [Poison Yu] was a bandit Yu Du [Poison Yu] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Poison Yu, or Yu Du, was a leader among the Black Mountain Bandits, who were active in the Taihang mountain range in AD 185. In AD 191 Poison Yu was defeated by Cao Cao in Dong commandery. In Ad 193 he attempted to capture Ye city with a group of mutineers, but he was defeated and driven away by Yuan Shao, who pursued him into Henei and killed him.
